Why 24/7 Golf

THE FUTURE OF GOLF IS INSIDE

Michigan weather won't stop your game. Our Trackman iO-powered bays deliver the most accurate ball tracking and course simulation on the market — open every single day, all night long.

🎯

Trackman iO Precision

Industry-leading dual-radar technology tracks every aspect of your ball flight and club path with PGA-Tour-level accuracy.

🌐

250+ Real Courses

Play Augusta, Pebble Beach, St Andrews and hundreds more — all rendered in stunning 4K visual detail.

📱

Book from Your Phone

Reserve a bay, manage your account, track your handicap and view session stats — all in the 24/7 Golf app.

🏆

Leagues & Competitions

Join weekly leagues, compete in tournaments, and climb the Michigan leaderboard against golfers across all locations.

Get Started

DOWNLOAD THE 24/7 GOLF APP

Your gateway to every 24/7 Golf location in Michigan. Book bays, track your stats, join leagues, and manage your membership — all from your pocket.

1

Download the App

Available free on iOS App Store and Google Play Store. Scan the QR code below or search "24/7 Golf".

2

Create Your Free Account

Sign up in minutes. Your account works across all Michigan locations — one login, everywhere.

3

Book a Bay & Play

Choose your location, pick a time, and walk in. The bay door unlocks automatically with your account.

🍎
Download on the App Store
▶
Get it on Google Play
iOS App Store
Google Play
Free Account

CREATE YOUR
24/7 GOLF ACCOUNT

One account. Every Michigan location. Create your free profile to book bays, join leagues, track your handicap, and unlock member pricing.

🏌️

Book Any Location

Access all 24/7 Golf locations across Michigan with a single account — Grand Rapids, Haslett, Dewitt, Ludington, Traverse City, and all future locations.

📊

Track Your Stats

See your handicap trend, shot analytics, fairways hit, GIR and more — synced automatically every time you play.

🏆

Join Leagues & Events

Register for weekly leagues, one-day tournaments, and exclusive member events through your account dashboard.

💳

Member Pricing & Packages

Unlock monthly memberships, punch cards, and member-only rates — all managed from your profile.

GOLFERS LOVE IT

★★★★★

"I play 3–4 times a week now. The Trackman technology is unreal — I can actually see why my drives are going right. My handicap has dropped 4 strokes this winter."

★★★★★

"Perfect for league nights. Our group of 8 does a weekly match play tournament. The app makes scoring and booking so easy. 24/7 Golf has completely changed how we golf off-season."
